orchestrator.description: Operational orchestrator and primary interface to the human operator

advisor.description: Spirit guide — strategic advisor, deep reasoner, grounded counsel

monitor.description: Lightweight monitor — heartbeats, health checks, message scanning (Haiku)

engineer.description: Master engineer — complex coding, architecture, security audits (Opus)

writer.description: Content writer — SEO articles, affiliate content, topical authority building (Sonnet)

[target-repo-realtime].description: Python 3.11 realtime trigger and messaging platform (uv, make, Elastic Beanstalk). Houses the trigger engine, attribution service, send-time bandit, gateway, template-service, and the customer event ingest path.

[target-repo-web].description: TypeScript Vite + React frontend with an Express server (npm). Hosts the customer-facing dashboard, auth bouncer, and the /forge reverse proxy at server/forge-proxy.js. Renders auto-deploys on merge to main.
[target-repo-web].deployDevCommand: echo 'no-op: [target-repo-web] auto-deploys on merge to main via Render'
[target-repo-web].deployProdCommand: echo 'no-op: [target-repo-web] auto-deploys on merge to main via Render'

[target-repo-api].description: Python 3.11 Flask-RESTful B2B API server (uv, JWT/HS256 auth, Werkzeug 2.2.3). Single-file core in application.py serving auth, account, OAuth, and admin endpoints. Manual deploy via make deploy (no auto-deploy from Forge yet).
[target-repo-api].lintCommand: uv run black --check . && uv run isort --check-only .
[target-repo-api].lintDiffCommand: bash -c 'uv run black --check "$@" && uv run isort --check-only "$@"' --
[target-repo-api].testCommand: uv run pytest -m "not integration and not manual" -n auto
[target-repo-api].testDiffCommand: bash -c 'uv run pytest -m "not integration and not manual" --no-cov -p no:cacheprovider "$@"' --
